sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39215" key="e)pidialu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδια-λύω</orth>, <sense id="n39215.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">come as a relief to</tr_>, c. acc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:8:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.8.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
